name: spec-loop
description: Spec-driven nested loop. v0.4: fully tests-first — drops the per-task codex review step (tests are the only convergence gate). Global review is now slice-based: codex produces structured JSON findings per slice (api-contracts / ui-integration / test-coverage / security), Claude's global-review-analyst decides. Auto git add -N on setup eliminates the diff false-positive class. Command surface unchanged (7 /spec-loop:* commands).
